name: PVH CORP. /DE/
business: We design and market branded sportswear, jeanswear, performance apparel, intimate apparel, underwear, swimwear, dress shirts, handbags, accessories, footwear and other related products under the TOMMY HILFIGER and Calvin Klein brands, as well as heritage brands. We sell to wholesale customers, directly to consumers through retail stores and digital commerce, and through licensing.
sellsTo: wholesale customers (department and specialty stores, pure play digital commerce retailers, franchisees, distributors, off-price retailers)
direct-to-consumer (retail stores and digital commerce sites)

exposures.sentence: We design and market branded sportswear (casual apparel), jeanswear, performance apparel, intimate apparel, underwear, swimwear, dress shirts, handbags, accessories, footwear and other related products.
the operation of retail stores and digital commerce sites under our TOMMY HILFIGER and Calvin Klein trademarks.

catalysts.sentence: These agreements now have staggered expirations through 2026, the first of which occurred at the end of calendar 2023.

catalysts.event: Stock repurchases of at least $300 million in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We currently expect common stock repurchases under the stock repurchase program of at least $300 million during 2026.

catalysts.event: Capital expenditures of approximately $250 million in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We currently project that capital expenditures for 2026 will increase to approximately $250 million.

tamClaims.claim: Global retail sales of Tommy Hilfiger products approximately $9 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: Global retail sales of products sold under the TOMMY HILFIGER brands, including sales of our licensees products, were approximately $9 billion in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: Global retail sales of Calvin Klein products approximately $9 billion in 2025
tamClaims.sentence: Global retail sales of products sold under the Calvin Klein brands, including sales of our licensees products, were approximately $9 billion in 2025.
